title: Data Centre Engineer (Contract)
description:
Position: Data Centre Engineer (Contract)
Contract Period: Feb 2026 – Dec 2026
Salary Range: $4,000 – $5,000

Role Overview:
We are seeking a Data Centre Engineer with practical data centre experience. The role does not require deep technical expertise but demands familiarity with day-to-day operations and procedures within a high-risk data centre environment.

Coverage & Locations:

  • One full-time onsite engineer covering two locations:

    1. Kim Chuan Road

    2. Serangoon North Ave 6

  • Engineer will visit both sites as required based on workload and change planning.

  • Backfill will be provided for planned leave, sickness, or unplanned absence.

Responsibilities:

  • Work Monday–Friday, 12:00 pm – 9:00 pm, with occasional weekend overtime.

  • Manage change control, incidents, and service requests within agreed SLA.

  • Track and manage assets; update relevant documentation and inventories.

  • Supervise and escort third-party vendors.

  • Plan, implement, and decommission IT hardware and network cabling per strict Data Centre standards.

  • Ensure compliance with Health & Safety, quality standards, and security procedures.

  • Maintain Data Centre toolsets and governance processes.

  • Collaborate with facilities teams to maximize energy efficiency.

  • Support day-to-day operations including racking, stacking, moves, changes, decommissioning, patching, and basic server configuration (iDRAC, ILO).

  • Participate in major infrastructure projects, such as power outages and replacements.

  • Manage complex inter-rack and room cable infrastructure.

Requirements:

  • Previous experience in a similar data centre role.

  • Experience working in high-risk environments.

  • Knowledge of DCIM tools and ticketing systems (ServiceNow, Remedy) is desirable.

  • Proficient in MS Office and service delivery applications.

We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment.
